summary: Backend testing complete for MLB Under Profile + 4 New Scrapers feature. All 66 tests passed successfully.
passed_tests: ✅ All 6 new modules import successfully (mlb_starter_lineup_under_profile, signal_catalog, rotogrinders_mlb, fantasyalarm_mlb, sofascore_basketball, flashscore_basketball)

✅ All 6 new signals exist in catalog and are baseball-only (STRONG_STARTING_PITCHER_PROFILE, UNDER_TREND_DETECTED, EARLY_INNING_UNDER_DEPENDENCY, LOW_SCORING_GAME_SCRIPT, PROTECTED_TOTAL_MARKET, H2H_LOW_TOTAL_PATTERN)
✅ make_signal() correctly filters cross-sport signals (returns None for football when signal is baseball-only)
✅ mlb_starter_lineup_under_profile() returns correct structure with Phillies-Cleveland validated case
✅ Classification is VALUE_BET with underProfileScore=89 (>= 75 threshold)
✅ All 5 expected signals present in result (STRONG_STARTING_PITCHER_PROFILE, H2H_LOW_TOTAL_PATTERN, UNDER_TREND_DETECTED, PROTECTED_TOTAL_MARKET, LOW_SCORING_GAME_SCRIPT)
✅ All required fields present (classification, confidence, underProfileScore, fragilityScore, reasons, risks, signals, alt_markets, early_inning_dependency)
✅ rescue_mlb_pitchers consults 6 sources (was 4): rotowire, mlb_official, fantasypros, espn, rotogrinders, fantasyalarm
✅ rotogrinders_mlb_lineups and fantasyalarm_mlb_lineups are in ALL_SCRAPERS list
✅ rescue_mlb_pitchers returns results with sources_consulted containing all 6 sources
✅ Orchestrator (analyze_mlb_day) returns correct structure with picks, rescued_picks, discarded_picks, pipeline_meta
✅ Pipeline meta explains abort reason when no games available (no_probable_pitchers_all_sources)
✅ All 5 existing signals still work (PITCHER_NOT_CONFIRMED, MLB_COM_FALLBACK_USED, IL_DEPTH_RISK, EXTERNAL_SOURCE_USED, PITCHER_CONFIRMED_EXTERNAL)

mlb_starter_lineup_under_profile.details: Function correctly implements Phillies-Cleveland validated case. Returns VALUE_BET classification with score 89, selection 'Under 7.5', and all expected signals.

signal_catalog.details: All 6 new signals (STRONG_STARTING_PITCHER_PROFILE, UNDER_TREND_DETECTED, EARLY_INNING_UNDER_DEPENDENCY, LOW_SCORING_GAME_SCRIPT, PROTECTED_TOTAL_MARKET, H2H_LOW_TOTAL_PATTERN) are properly defined as baseball-only. Cross-sport filtering works correctly.

orchestrator_integration.details: analyze_mlb_day includes under_profile field in pick payloads. Priority logic implemented (Under VALUE_BET ≥75 takes precedence). Editorial signals are properly injected.

new_scrapers.details: All 4 new scrapers (rotogrinders_mlb, fantasyalarm_mlb, sofascore_basketball, flashscore_basketball) are importable with correct function signatures. rescue_mlb_pitchers now consults 6 sources (was 4). Note: Some scrapers may fail with status='failed' due to HTML changes, but the contract is that they are CALLED, not that they always succeed.

regression.details: All existing signals still work. API endpoints (auth/login, analysis/run for baseball and basketball) return 200 with correct structure.

notes: No MLB games available today (abort_reason: no_probable_pitchers_all_sources), which is expected behavior.

Some external scrapers (mlb_official_lineups, fantasypros_mlb_lineups, rotogrinders_mlb_lineups, fantasyalarm_mlb_lineups) returned status='failed', which is acceptable as the contract is that they are consulted, not that they always succeed.
rotowire_mlb_lineups and espn_mlb_scoreboard returned status='success', demonstrating the multi-source rescue layer is working.
The implementation matches all specifications from the review request.
